allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Fluent.ai" -Recurse | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace\('c:\\Fluent.ai\\',''\)}} | Where-Object {$_.Path -notmatch 'node_modules'} | Sort-Object Path | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Path)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Processo $proc encerrado." } else { Write-Host "Nenhum processo na porta 3000." })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "c:\\Fluent.ai"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" -e "try { require\('./server.js'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error: ' + e.message\) }" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
